name: Agent Cost Meter
description: Tracks cumulative agent session spend against budget ceilings. Calculates cost from token usage and API calls, returns budget status with actionable recommendations. Covers OWASP FinOps runaway-spend prevention. Pay-per-request via x402 (USDC on Base).

authentication.instructions: Send USDC on Base to the recipient address, then include the tx hash in the X-Payment-Tx header.

tools.name: check_agent_cost
tools.description: Tracks cumulative agent session spend against a budget ceiling. Calculates cost from token usage and API calls, returns budget status (ok/warning/exceeded) with actionable recommendations.

agentId.description: Unique identifier for the agent session

action.description: Description of the action being costed
